_comment: Representative Cloudflare Access application policy JSON. For Lab 05 analysis. Not a real deployment artifact.
name: Meridian Lab App

policies.name: email-auth-basic
policies._note: Basic: allows only a specific email address. No device posture required. This is the starting policy for the lab.

policies.name: corp-email-domain
policies._note: Improved: allows any @meridian.com email. Still no posture requirement. Lab step 6: change from specific email to domain.

policies.name: corp-email-with-warp

device_posture._note: Requires WARP client enrollment. Replaces include with AND: email domain AND WARP enrolled.

policies._note: ZT-aligned: requires both corporate email domain AND WARP enrollment. 'include' is OR; 'require' is AND.

policies.name: corp-email-with-posture-score

device_posture._note: Requires CrowdStrike ZTA score >= 70. Requires Cloudflare-CrowdStrike integration configured in Zero Trust settings.

policies._note: Production-grade: corporate email AND CrowdStrike posture score. Closest to ZT maturity model 'Advanced' for device pillar.

_policy_types_explained.include: OR condition — any of these rules matching is sufficient to include the user
_policy_types_explained.require: AND condition — ALL of these rules must match; typically used for device posture in addition to identity
_policy_types_explained.exclude: Override — if this matches, the user is excluded even if include and require pass
